main.description: Camera model/type (e.g. Nikon F2). Instances reference this record. Projected into a photo's EXIF (e.g. social.grain.photo.exif) make/model when associated with a photo.

minShutterSpeed.description: Fastest shutter (shortest exposure), in seconds at 1e6 scale — e.g. 1/8000 s.

maxShutterSpeed.description: Slowest shutter (longest exposure), in seconds at 1e6 scale — e.g. 30 s.

flashSyncSpeed.description: Fastest normal flash-sync exposure in seconds at 1e6 scale, e.g. 1/250 s is 4000.

shutterSpeedSteps.description: Exact shutter speeds for the shot logger dial, in seconds at 1e6 scale. When present, overrides min/max and stop-fraction generation.

shutterStopIncrement.description: Default stop fraction when generating shutter options from min/max (shot logger may override when steps are absent).

isoMin.description: Lowest supported ISO/ASA setting, excluding special low extensions.

isoMax.description: Highest supported ISO/ASA setting, excluding special high extensions.

isoSteps.description: Exact supported ISO/ASA settings when the camera uses a discrete dial or menu.

exposureCompensationMin.description: Minimum exposure compensation in EV at 1e6 scale, usually negative.

exposureCompensationMax.description: Maximum exposure compensation in EV at 1e6 scale.

viewfinderCoverage.description: Viewfinder frame coverage as a proportion at 1e6 scale; 100% is 1000000.

viewfinderMagnification.description: Nominal viewfinder magnification ratio at 1e6 scale.

autofocusSystem.description: Manufacturer name or concise description of the autofocus system.

batteryTypes.description: Manufacturer-specified battery designations, preserving regional equivalents when useful.

weight.description: Manufacturer-specified body weight; notes or source location should state whether batteries are included.

sensorWidth.description: Active or effective sensor width, normally in millimetres.

sensorHeight.description: Active or effective sensor height, normally in millimetres.

storageMedia.description: Supported storage media or card standards.

rawFormats.description: Manufacturer RAW file formats or extensions supported by the camera.

image.description: Product photo for this type, typically the manufacturer box/product shot. When unset, clients fall back to a Wikidata image.

datasheet.description: Official datasheet: a link (preferred), an uploaded file, or another record.

documents.description: Technical sheets, manuals, catalogs, and other documents consulted for this model.

specSources.description: Field-level assertions identifying the exact document location behind structured specifications.
